Your email list should be working harder for you
Your audience is more valuable than you think. Kit is the email marketing platform that helps you grow your list, find your highest-value subscribers, and earn more from every send.
Start free trial
14-day free trial. No credit card required. Free migrations.
Trusted By
Anne-Laure Le Cunff
Neuroscientist and bestselling author
Get more subscribers
with landing pages, forms, and creator recommendations.
Send beautiful emails
that build relationships, not just revenue.
Automate your work
with apps that connect your creator tools directly to Kit.
Earn more on autopilot
with your digital products, subscriptions, and newsletter sponsorships.

For over a decade and counting, Kit is the email marketing platform experts choose to grow their audience, deepen their relationships, and build a business around the work they love.
Start free trial
No credit card required
Early Access
Subscriber Signals
Behind every email address is a real person. Subscriber Signals shows you who they are and how they can change your business.
Get notified the moment a high-value subscriber joins your list
Win bigger sponsorships with Kit-verified audience data
Search your list by industry, location, or social reach in one click
Start Pro free trial
Learn more
Click for sound
Focus on what you love, automate more with Kit
Jump to features
Grow your email list, not your to-do list
Your expertise deserves a bigger audience. Reach more people and grow your list on autopilot with
no-code landing pages, opt-in forms, and newsletter recommendations.
Start free trial
No credit card required
Sell more without being salesy
Kit’s tags and segments help you organize your audience based on their interests so the
right people get the right message at the right time
.
Build once, benefit forever
Automations welcome new subscribers, nurture relationships, and
drive sales 24/7
. It's like having another “you” in your business.
Reach more people with every email
With an industry-leading
99.8% delivery rate and average open rates above 40%
, your carefully crafted emails land in inboxes, not spam folders.
Email analytics that drive revenue
See which email subscribers are most engaged, where they came from, and how long they stay, so you can
double down on what’s working and fix what isn’t
.
Start free trial
No credit card required
NEW
Kit MCP
Connect Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, and more directly to Kit so every AI analysis and action is personal to your business, your audience, and your list—with you in control of every move.
Real answers from your actual Kit data—not generic AI advice
Tag subscribers, draft broadcasts, and trigger workflows from one conversation
You set the permissions and can revoke access anytime
Start free trial
Learn more
Click for sound
The email marketing platform for creators who mean business
Start free trial
Request a demo
14-day free trial. No credit card required. Free migrations.
Email marketing
Reach your audience with personalized, engaging emails.
Newsletters
Write and design newsletters that build loyal fans.
Visual Automations
Build email sequences and workflows that run 24/7.
Forms & opt-ins
Capture subscribers with customizable opt-in forms.
Segmentation & tagging
Organize subscribers for targeted, relevant messaging.
Landing pages
Build beautiful customized website pages that convert.
Recommendations
Grow subscribers by cross-promoting with other creators.
Kit App Store
Connect all your tools so everything works together seamlessly.
Analytics
Track engagement and growth with actionable audience insights.
Email A/B testing
Optimize email conversions with data-driven split testing.
Newsletter sponsorships
Earn from your newsletter with brand sponsorships.
Commerce
Sell digital products, memberships, and subscriptions directly through Kit.
Subscriber Signals
Find your best subscribers and what they're worth to your business.
Kit MCP
Connect your AI tool directly to Kit and turn insights into action.
Dynamic content
Deliver personalized content to every subscriber, automatically.
Kit Studios
Professional production studios in NYC, Chicago, and Boise, free for Kit creators.
Free access to professional recording studios
Located in NYC, Chicago, and Boise.
Start free trial
Explore studios
Smart apps that connect your creator tools directly to Kit
Your personalized hub for streamlining your business and creative workflows.
Start free trial
No credit card required
Your personalized hub for streamlining your business and creative workflows.
Shopify
Grow Your Creator Business, Automate Your Marketing, and Drive More Sales
+
Canva
Get access to your Canva library natively within the Kit media gallery
+
Circle
Connect Kit with your Circle Community.
+
GIPHY
Get access to the world's largest library of free GIFs, Clips, & Stickers.
+
SavvyCal
Embed beautiful booking links in your Kit emails. Perfect for coaching calls and webinars.
Custom Fonts
Use custom fonts in your emails by dynamically rendering them as images
Lex
Write something great today. We'll analyze your style and create custom prompts for you.
Senja
Add your text and video testimonials to your Kit emails. Increase your sales.
Sponsy
Connect your ad inventory from Sponsy straight to Kit
Transistor.fm
Embed great-looking podcast players into your Kit emails, linked to a playable web page.
Linktree
Sync contact lists seamlessly between Linktree and Kit
Thinkific
Create online courses, digital products, and communities that actually sell.
See all apps
Experts use Kit to build relationships and revenue
When I first announced the book on Instagram, it had a little bump in pre-order numbers, but when
I sent an email to my list using Kit—that's when we started to see some real movement
.
Nisha V

Grow your audience
Subscribers
The total number of subscribers you can manage in your account. Subscribers are only counted if they are unique and active.
Up to 10,000
1,000
1,000
1,000
1,000
Create landing pages
No website? No problem. Create focused landing pages to capture emails, test ideas, or promote specific offers.
Unlimited
Unlimited
Unlimited
Create email opt-in forms
Create unlimited email opt-in forms you can embed to your website as a modal, sticky bar, slide in, or inline embed.
Unlimited
Unlimited
Unlimited
Create a newsletter feed & website
Create a newsletter site to host all your newsletter content, links, products, and more.
Landing page and form templates
Whether you're creating a landing page or a form, we have a library of beautiful customizable templates to help you get started.
Customizable domain
Customize your free Kit domain or connect your own custom domain so all your landing pages are branded.
Unlimited traffic
We’re here to help you grow your audience. So share your ideas with the world. Our servers can handle it.
Deliver opt-in incentives
Offer a freebie digital file to your audience that will be delivered automatically when they sign up.
List growth reporting
Detailed analytics of your audience growth. See what forms or pages people are signing up for, and track unsubscribes too.
Free Recommendations
Grow your email list with high quality subscribers through the network of Kit creators.
Required
Required
Smart Recommendations
Smart Recommendations guarantees your newsletter is promoted across relevant creator sign up forms.
-
Facebook custom audiences
Dynamically sync subscribers in Kit to your Facebook custom audiences for stronger ad targeting.
-
-
Newsletter referral system
Get a free SparkLoop plan (worth $99/mo) to build a reward referral program to drive newsletter growth.
-
-
Subscriber management
Subscriber tagging
Tag subscribers by entry point, interest, actions, and any other way you want to organize subscribers on your email list.
Subscriber segmentation
Segment subscribers by grouping tags in the same category to personalize your communications.
Unsubscribe page builder
Create topics of interests and customize your unsubscribe page to reduce subscriber churn.
Users
The total number of users you can have on your account. Perfect for adding your team, with their own login, to support your marketing efforts.
1
2
Unlimited
Subscriber engagement scoring
Identify your highest-value subscribers for sponsor pitches, VIP offers, or re-engagement campaigns.
-
-
Subscriber Signals
Audience research, done for you automatically. See demographics, social influence, and engagement data on the real people behind every email address.
-
-
Engagement analytics
See which subscribers are most engaged, where they came from, and how long they stay, so you can double down on what's working.
-
-
Send email campaigns
Send email broadcasts
Send or schedule one-time email campaigns or newsletters to your list.
Email template library
Use our email templates as a starting point to easily customize your email so it fits your brand and content.
Image library
Access to your own image library with photos you use often, Unsplash, and your own Instagram photos.
Create custom email templates
Create your very own custom email templates with HTML/CSS.
Conditional email content
Use Liquid to deeply personalize your content, showing different relevant content to different subscribers based on their tags.
Resend unopened campaigns
One-click to resend email campaigns to subscribers who have not yet open

hits.title: Ask HN: Low Cost Email Automation?

analysis.name: ConvertKit (Kit)
analysis.tagline: Your email list should be working harder for you
analysis.value_proposition: Email marketing platform for creators to grow their list, identify high-value subscribers, and monetize every send.
analysis.ideal_customer: Professional creators — authors, YouTubers, podcasters, course creators, musicians, bloggers, coaches, newsletter operators

features.name: email broadcasts
features.description: Unlimited one-off email broadcasts to subscribers

features.name: visual automations
features.description: Drag-and-drop visual automation builder for workflows

features.name: landing pages
features.description: Unlimited landing pages for list growth

features.name: digital product sales
features.description: Sell digital products directly from Kit

features.name: paid subscriptions
features.description: Recurring subscription revenue for paid newsletters
features.evidence_quote: Earn recurring income with newsletter subscriptions

features.name: rss campaigns
features.description: Send emails automatically from an RSS feed

features.name: 24/7 email chat support
features.description: Round-the-clock support via email and chat

features.name: apps and integrations
features.description: Access to Kit App Store integrations

features.name: kit mcp
features.description: Model Context Protocol server for AI agent access to Kit

features.name: unlimited users
features.description: Add unlimited team users to the account

features.name: facebook custom audiences
features.description: Sync subscribers to Facebook custom audiences

features.name: edit sent broadcasts
features.description: Edit links in broadcasts that have already been sent

features.name: creator recommendations
features.description: Grow lists via cross-recommendations across creators
features.evidence_quote: landing pages, forms, and creator recommendations

features.name: paid recommendations
features.description: Earn revenue by recommending other newsletters

features.name: kit app store
features.description: App marketplace to connect creator tools

features.name: commerce
features.description: Product pages and automated fulfillment for digital products
features.evidence_quote: Simple product pages, automated fulfillment, and low transaction fees

features.name: free migrations
features.description: Free migration service from other email platforms

features.name: creator network
features.description: Network for creators to grow lists together
features.evidence_quote: Creator Network, where creators grow their email list together

features.name: visual rules
features.evidence_quote: Automate your account with Visual Automations, Rules, Integrations, and RSS

features.name: kit api
features.description: Public API for building custom apps
features.evidence_quote: Create the app you wish existed... Explore Kit API

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Real-time subscriber webhooks via Send a Webhook app
features.evidence_quote: Send real-time subscriber data to any webhook from Kit automations

features.name: kit studios
features.description: Professional recording studios for Kit creators
features.evidence_quote: Professional recording studios for Kit creators

features.name: hire a kit expert
features.description: Directory of vetted Kit experts for hire

differentiators: Built specifically for creators (not general SMB marketers)
Creator Network for cross-promotion / list growth between creators
Paid Recommendations and Newsletter Sponsorships monetization built in
Kit MCP — early MCP server for AI agent access
Kit Studios (physical recording studios for creators)

recent_ships.source: 'See every new feature we launched at Craft + Commerce 2026'

praised: 'The Kit App Store was honestly one of the reasons I switched to Kit. The ability to combine different software through my email system has been a game changer.' — Tim Mcburnie

free_tier.limits: Up to 1,000 subscribers; 1 basic Visual Automation; limited automations

tiers.name: Newsletter
tiers.headline_inclusions: 1 basic Visual Automation, unlimited landing pages/forms/broadcasts, tagging, digital products

tiers.name: Creator
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited automations & sequences, Kit MCP, A/B test subjects, SMS, integrations, RSS, 24/7 support

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: Adds Subscriber Signals, engagement analytics, unlimited users, deliverability reporting, referral system

pricing.notes: Prices anchored to 1,000 subscribers; scales with list size. Yearly plans save 17% ($390/yr Creator, $790/yr Pro). 14-day free trial, no credit card required.
